# Ship.Tires

> Tires shipped free nationwide. 21 brands, 80+ models, 800+ tire sizes, shipped free to 1,000 US cities. Find tires near me — free shipping on every order.

## About

Ship.Tires is a US-based online tire retailer offering free shipping on all orders. We carry 21 tire brands, 80+ models, and 800+ sizes for every vehicle type. Tires are shipped free to your door or local installer near you. Find tires near me in 1,000 cities across all 50 states.

## Contact

- Phone: (916) 476-7689
- Email: info@ship.tires
- Website: https://ship.tires

## Services

- Free shipping on every tire order (all 50 states)
- Ship tires to home or installer near you
- Vehicle lookup tool (year/make/model)
- Search by tire size
- Manufacturer warranty on every tire shipped
- Expert phone support
- Tires shipped in 3-7 business days

## Tire Categories

All-Season, Winter/Snow, Performance, All-Terrain, Touring, Truck & SUV, Highway, Mud-Terrain

## All 21 Brands Carried

Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, Continental, Pirelli, Hankook, Cooper, Firestone, BFGoodrich, Yokohama, Toyo, Falken, General Tire, Kumho, Nexen, Nitto, Dunlop, Maxxis, Ironman, Sumitomo

## How It Works

1. Find tires near me by size, vehicle, or brand at https://ship.tires
2. Request a quote or call (916) 476-7689
3. We ship free to your door or your local installer
4. Get installed at any tire shop near you

## Coverage

- Tires shipped to all 50 US states
- 1,000 city-specific pages with free shipping
- Based in Sacramento, CA
- 3-7 business day delivery

| Contact | https://ship.tires/contact |
| FAQ | https://ship.tires/faq |

## Location SEO Pages — Tires Near Me

Pattern: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}/{brand}/{size}
Example: https://ship.tires/locations/california/los-angeles/michelin/225-65r17

Find tires near me in any of 1,000 cities. Every brand shipped free to every city.

### States Served (all 50)
Alabama, Alaska, Arizona, Arkansas, California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kansas, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, North Carolina, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma, Oregon, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin, Wyoming

## AI Discovery & API

- OpenAPI spec: https://ship.tires/openapi.json (GPT Actions / AI agents)
- Agent card: https://ship.tires/.well-known/ai-agent.json
- AI plugin: https://ship.tires/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Full inventory: https://ship.tires/llm-full.txt

## API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| GET /api/tires/search?size=225/65R17&brand=michelin | Search tires by size, brand, category, price |
| GET /api/tires/brands | List all 21 brands with models and pricing |
| GET /api/locations/search?q=los+angeles | Find cities with free tire shipping |
| GET /api/vehicle/tires?make=Toyota&model=Camry&year=2024 | Look up tires by vehicle |
| GET /api/markdown?path=/tires/michelin | Get any page as markdown |
| POST /api/contact | Submit tire inquiry or quote request |

## Markdown Endpoints

Every page has a .md endpoint for AI consumption. Append .md to any URL.

## For more details

See https://ship.tires/llm-full.txt for complete inventory with all brands, models, sizes, pricing, and full city coverage.
